channel.title: Comments on: Creating your own COCOAPOD

item.title: By: SHViewPager: Android like view pager control for iOS Version 2 finally! | codewithshabib
item.dc:creator: SHViewPager: Android like view pager control for iOS Version 2 finally! | codewithshabib

item.title: By: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.dc:creator: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.description:
In reply to <a href="./../comment-page-1/index.html#comment-17">Md. Aminul Islam Bhuiyan</a>.
Thanks! I was confused too, but when you get start using cocoapods you will see the difference by yourself. It is fairly easy to use and you don't have to worry a single thing about dependency complications (You know how messy that can get over the time!).
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Md. Aminul Islam Bhuiyan.

Thanks! I was confused too, but when you get start using cocoapods you will see the difference by yourself. It is fairly easy to use and you don’t have to worry a single thing about dependency complications (You know how messy that can get over the time!).

item.title: By: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.dc:creator: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.description:
In reply to <a href="./../comment-page-1/index.html#comment-18">Mehedi Hasan</a>.
Thanks man :)

item.title: By: Mehedi Hasan
item.dc:creator: Mehedi Hasan
item.description:
You are right. We rely very much on the open source and its our duty to to be one of the contributors.
Thanks for sharing nice article. Keep it up brother. :)
item.content:encoded:
You are right. We rely very much on the open source and its our duty to to be one of the contributors.

Thanks for sharing nice article. Keep it up brother. 🙂

item.title: By: Md. Aminul Islam Bhuiyan
item.dc:creator: Md. Aminul Islam Bhuiyan
item.description: Great post... but it is really good to use CocoaPods rather than using the Library? I was confused form the start. Which one is better?
item.content:encoded:
Great post…
but it is really good to use CocoaPods rather than using the Library? I was confused form the start. Which one is better?

item.title: By: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.dc:creator: Ahmad Shabibul Hossain
item.description: In reply to <a href="./../comment-page-1/index.html#comment-15">Dipayan</a>. Thank you man! I appreciate your response Will try to post regularly from now on
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Dipayan.

Thank you man! I appreciate your response 😊 Will try to post regularly from now on 😊

item.title: By: Dipayan
item.dc:creator: Dipayan
item.description: Awesome post, very helpful, please keep posting more like this.
item.content:encoded: Awesome post, very helpful, please keep posting more like this.
